name: Metathrone
short_description: Young hacker Iten Langley is a true legend of information networks. He works for his own profit, spying and hacking into defense systems. But his whole life changed in a matter of seconds, when after another attack on the server for him begins a real hunt!
detailed_description:
Young hacker Iten Langley is a true legend of information networks. He works for his own profit, spying and hacking into defense systems. But his whole life changed in a matter of seconds, when after another attack on the server for him begins a real hunt! In addition, the hero suddenly manifests hitherto hidden superhuman abilities. Now Iten needs to find out what is behind the mysterious project “Metathrone” and reveal the secret of his origin. Powerful corporations, ancient civilizations and political intrigue - in a stunning cyberpunk-inspired story!

• Gorgeous anime style graphics

• Original story and unique game locations

• Ability to reincarnate as an Geaa alien

• New abilities - supernatural strength and speed
